description: This is a component that tracks the load status of a list of assets locally.

fields.Assets: List of assets that the component should listen to for loading status
fields.IsLoaded: Are all the assets in Assets list loaded?
fields.LoadProgress: The ratio of "how many assets are loaded" to the total asset count.
fields.ProgressWeight: The total count of assets in ``Assets``.

notes.title: Introduction
notes.text: This is a component that tracks the load status of a list of assets locally.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: This component returns a ratio of how many of the given assets are actually loaded.
